title: Eugene's Wealthy Plains Village
description: Overhaul your plains village for better looking and experience.
body:
This is originally for modpack [AnimateCraft: Lankeren](https://modrinth.com/modpack/animatecraft-lankeren). If you like this content, I'm sure you'll like that modpack, too. Welcome to check it out!

---
Vanilla villages are so...vanilla.

I overhauled the plain village for my modpack  [Lankeren](https://modrinth.com/modpack/animatecraft-lankeren), as a good start.

The buildings are a bit cartoon-style, but I tried my best to keep the vanilla feeling.

Now the plains village looks good, and has abundant resources in **almost every building**.
Loots in the chests are related to the building it's in, there' are even distinctions between loots in big houses and loots in smaller ones.
